name: Pork Cardinal Style
recipeInstructions:
1. The day before, cover the dried apricots with water and cook until they are soft.
2. Mix brandy and seasonings (1 tablespoon oil) and brush the meat on all sides. Let it set for 30 minutes.
3. Cook rice according to directions.
4. Heat leftover oil in a skillet and fry the meat until browned on all sides. Add salt, then remove the meat and keep it warm.
5. Add apricots with juice, leftover marinade, and butter to the frying fat in the skillet. Stir and let cook until reduced slightly.
6. Add cream and taste sauce, seasoning more if necessary.
7. Cut meat into slices and serve on rice with the apricots.
